text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun is scorching and senior year summer camp
has arrived! And as for Mejiro Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
During this summer camp, I wish to go 1000 times
beyond my limit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That said, I am serious about pushing my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This will be a great opportunity to thoroughly
prepare for the Mainichi Okan.
choice_data_list: Let's give it all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another hot and heated summer camp is about to
begin!
